content_body: I must start out by saying that this is a VERY beautiful place! We all got together to rent this for our friend's birthday weekend, and that was the BEST decision! Not only is the view breathtaking, but there's also so much space in the entire cabin!!! I love the kitchen—plenty of room for everyone to participate in the family meal! I would definitely recommend this cabin to friends and family!!! And I can't forget ALL the questions I had for Nicole; she was great and very helpful!!!
title: "The BEST Decision!"
